title: Protocol for Sampling and Transport of Nose and Throat Samples
author: Dina Stensen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.2j5gcq6

steps.title: Moisture the rayon-tipped swab in 2-3...
steps.instruction: Moisture the rayon-tipped swab in 2-3 drops of sterile NaCl 0,9 mg/ml. There should be two samples from the nasal cavity.

steps.title: Lead the rayon-tipped swab carefully into...
steps.instruction: Lead the rayon-tipped swab carefully into the nasal cavity approximately 1-2 cm and rotate with delicate pressure 3 times in both nasal cavity. The same swab should be used for both anterior nares.

steps.title: Place both swabs in the Coban transport medium
steps.instruction: Place both swabs in the Coban transport medium.

steps.title: Label the transport medium with testnumber...
steps.instruction: Label the transport medium with testnumber and nasal swab 1 and 2. Nasal swab 1 is used for detection of bacterial analysis, and swab 2 for microbiome analysis.

steps.title: Moisture the rayon-tipped swab in 2-3...
steps.instruction: Moisture the rayon-tipped swab in 2-3 drops of sterile NaCl 0,9 mg/ml. There should be two samples from the throat.

steps.title: Ask the participant to open his/her mouth
steps.instruction: Ask the participant to open his/her mouth. Press the tongue spatula against the tongue and ask the participant to say "aaa". This will simplify the sampling because this will better the view of the tonsil region.

steps.title: Lead the rayon-tipped swab into the...
steps.instruction: Lead the rayon-tipped swab into the oral cavity and swab with moderate pressure on both tonsil regions (palatine tonsils). If the participants has had a former tonsillectomy/tonsillotomy the swab should be taken from the area of the removed tonsils. Use the same swab on both tonsils.

steps.title: Place both swabs in the Coban transport medium
steps.instruction: Place both swabs in the Coban transport medium.

steps.title: Label the transport medium with testnumber...
steps.instruction: Label the transport medium with testnumber and throat swab 1 and 2. Throat swab 1 is used for detection of bacterial analysis, and swab 2 for microbiome analysis.

steps.title: Wash hands with soap and water...
steps.instruction: Wash hands with soap and water or use hand disinfection after procedure

steps.title: Wash hands with soap and water...
steps.instruction: Wash hands with soap and water or use hand disinfection after procedure

steps.title: The swabs should be placed in a suitable rack
steps.instruction: The swabs should be placed in a suitable rack. If not picked up immediately, the samples should be placed in refrigerator awating pickup.
